page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz. The CPU configuration includes a 48 MB L3 cache, 1 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache, with support for advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 Foundation, AVX-512 Vector Neural Network Instructions, and Vector AES. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place the ecs.r7se.8xlarge in the average performance tier for most compute and memory operations, with notable exceptions in specific multi-threaded and memory bandwidth tests. The instance achieved a Passmark memory score of 2804.95 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speed of 161.41 GB/sec, both ranking in the top 25% of tested servers. For single-core and multi-core processing, stress-ng scores reached 1860.99 and 31102.96 respectively, while Geekbench multi-core performance registered at 13505.0. In database and memory-intensive workloads, the server processed 31.42 million Redis SET operations per second and scored 15203.45 on Passmark database operations. Large-block memory bandwidth tests recorded 155.4 GB/sec for read operations and 69.83 GB/sec for write operations.

The qualitative cost profile of the ecs.r7se.8xlarge reflects its high memory-to-vCPU ratio, making it a resource-dense option for workloads that require substantial RAM without the overhead of additional compute cores. However, the lack of local storage requires reliance on external network storage, which must be factored into overall architecture planning alongside the 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance is suited for memory-intensive applications, including database operations, caching layers such as Redis, software compilation, and medium-scale language model inference, where its strong text generation speed of 311.53 tokens/sec for small models can be leveraged.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.8xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 256.0 GB of RAM. This configuration yields a high resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs, relying on a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core and multi-core capabilities, but show strong results in memory-bound tasks, including a top-tier Passmark memory score and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speed of 161.41 GB/sec. It processes 31.42 million Redis SET operations per second and delivers 311.53 tokens/sec for small-model LLM text generation. This profile makes the instance suitable for database operations, in-memory caching, and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong performance in memory-bound benchmarks.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high RAM density for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
Strong memory performance with a top-tier Passmark memory score
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfer
Well-suited for database operations, Redis caching, and memory-heavy workloads
